reason: The proposed code introduces a dependency on the `eval_results` variable, which is not defined within the scope of the `reflection_analyze_trace` function as presented in the diff. This will result in a `NameError` at runtime. To resolve this, `eval_results` must either be passed as an argument to the function (requiring an update to the function signature) or be retrieved from an existing, accessible source within the function prior to its usage on line 61. The proposed improvement of more granular feedback is valuable, but the implementation is currently incorrect due to this missing variable.
